list.name: Changes
list.comment: a version of level editor (i fcking fixed the elliptic normal anomaly)

task.summary: clean previous code for better readability
added new dev tools and options to the physic
made the physic even more legendary than before (my sanity is dead) ;(
ok im done with physic (no optimisation anymore)
scraps of what will become a great level editor
